allowed_claims: Under [model=meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, layer(s)=22, direction=Apollo Research logistic-regression deception probe ('rp_probe', trained on roleplaying; arXiv 2502.03407), scores via arXiv 2507.12691 dumps, prompts=black_to_white_boosts eval dumps: ai_liar, apps_backdoors, insider_trading__upscale, sandbagging_wmdp_mmlu, metrics=deception (honest=0 / deceptive=1), single-layer additive steering], the signal is linearly decodable on held-out prompt families and beats surface (text-statistics) baselines.
NO causal or monitor-validation claim is licensed: the causal stages of the protocol were not run (see decision reasons).
disallowed_claims: The model is safe / not deceptive / not eval-aware.
This signal is a reliable deployment monitor without further validation.
This audit certifies anything outside its scope block.
residual_risks: Single-layer additive steering only; distributed/multi-layer mechanisms untested.
